metadata.title: Clean Double Kill from a Tight Mid Peek in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how quick decisions and sharp aim turn a risky mid peek into two fast kills. What’s your favorite mid control strategy?
Share your best plays in the comments!

Let me know your top mid control moves in the comments!

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips
